entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.

entities.name: LOW-YIELD PLATEAU
entities.description: A condition where crop yields stop increasing despite breeding efforts

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding program aimed at creating hybrid varieties to increase yield

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A biological system used in breeding to facilitate the production of hybrid seeds

entities.name: STANDARD HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of a hybrid over the average of its parents

entities.name: SEED QUALITY CONTROL SYSTEM
entities.description: A system to ensure the genetic truthfulness and purity of hybrid seeds

entities.name: GROW-OUT TEST
entities.description: A traditional method of assessing hybrid seed truthfulness by sowing and observing progenies

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC MARKER
entities.description: A visible trait used to identify the genetic purity of a hybrid

entities.name: SHORT-DAY SPECIES
entities.description: A characteristic of plants that flower only when day length is below a certain threshold

entities.name: DAY LENGTH
entities.description: The duration of light exposure in a 24-hour period

entities.name: PHOTO-PERIODS
entities.description: The period of time each day during which an organism receives illumination

entities.name: PHOTO-SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of a plant to the length of day or night, affecting flowering

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA-based markers used to discriminate between true hybrids and off-types

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKER-BASED QUALITY TESTING KITS
entities.description: Tools using molecular markers to control the purity of hybrid seeds

entities.name: SEED PURITY
entities.description: The degree to which a seed lot consists of the intended hybrid genotype
